name: AI Talent Database v3
postCreateCommand: cd v3/backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && mkdir -p ~/projects/talent-db/data ~/projects/talent-db/input/papers ~/projects/talent-db/input/resumes && cd ../frontend && npm install
postStartCommand: cd v3/backend && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8081 & cd ../frontend && npm run dev
